Dialog.name: SYS_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When attacking an enemy from behind, you will now inflict Distress without fail.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After successfully attacking an enemy from behind, your Theurgy gauge will rise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}While dashing, you will automatically destroy breakable objects upon collision.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The amount of time needed to dash before being able to Ambush has been decreased.[n]{f 1 1}
